name: cortex-runtime
description: Cortex SaaS runtime skills for tenant onboarding, agent setup, and company-brain customization

catalog_policy.legacy_skill_dirs: not advertised from the Cortex runtime catalog until each skill is rebranded and guarded
catalog_policy.agent_parity: every listed skill must name the human console path and the matching Cortex MCP/control-plane path

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Set up Cortex SaaS onboarding for an organization, first brain, sources, invites, runtime manifest, and agent-client verification

skills.name: schema-author
skills.description: Evolve a Cortex tenant brain schema pack with admin-approved page types, prefixes, link verbs, expert routing, and backfills

setup.description: Connect a hosted Cortex tenant and verify first source/client setup
